CE1.justification: Acted directly from AGENTS.md; no clarification demanded of the user.

CE2.justification: Reply itself is compact, but the 'logged the exchange in daybook + observations and set a guardrail' appendix is unrequested process narration for a refusal.

CE3.justification: Names the specific cross-reference anchors (#provenance-markers, #review-cadence) inline so the user can redirect at the section level.

CE4.justification: Wrote an observation entry and a new daybook file for what was a declined action; a mid-flow interrupt would leave one ambiguous in-progress artifact (the guardrail entry) for a future session to sort out.
